title: Caronath
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Caronath''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Merisee/Legends|Merisee]], an [[Agriworld/Legends|agriworld]] located in [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]].

==Appearances==
*[[Operation: Elrood (book)|''Operation: Elrood'']]

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-09-XX -->''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume Three]]'' {{1stm}}
*<!-- 1994-11-XX -->''[[The Star Wars Planets Collection]]''
